tool_args.label: Amtrak East River Tunnel rehabilitation
tool_args.raw_text: Amtrak rehabilitation work in the East River tunnels to repair damage caused by Superstorm Sandy

payload.description: Amtrak rehabilitation work in the East River tunnels to repair damage caused by Superstorm Sandy. Two tunnels require significant work, one tunnel removed from service at a time for approximately 30 months.

tool_args.label: Next Generation PTC Data Radio Procurement
tool_args.raw_text: Metro-North on behalf of itself and LIRR seeks Board approval for a competitively solicited and negotiated estimated quantity contract to the firm GE Grid Solutions LLC to supply Positive Train Control (PTC) Data Radios

payload.description: GE Grid Solutions LLC to design, build, and test the next generation PTC Data Radio with backwards compatibility to work with legacy radios. Contract for $3,797,000 over five years.

tool_args.label: LIRR schedule designed to accommodate East River Tunnel work
tool_args.raw_text: The upcoming November 11 timetable was designed to accommodate this work

payload.description: November 11 timetable was designed to accommodate Amtrak East River Tunnel rehabilitation work

tool_args.label: LIRR coordinated with Amtrak on timetable
tool_args.raw_text: months of dialogue between the three rail carriers that utilize Penn Station occurred prior to its finalization

payload.description: Months of dialogue between the three rail carriers that utilize Penn Station occurred prior to timetable finalization for East River Tunnel work

tool_args.label: PTC Data Radio - joint procurement by MNR and LIRR
tool_args.raw_text: Metro-North on behalf of itself and LIRR seeks Board approval for a competitively solicited and negotiated estimated quantity contract

payload.description: Metro-North on behalf of itself and LIRR seeks Board approval for the contract

tool_args.label: GE Grid Solutions contracted for PTC Data Radios
tool_args.raw_text: competitively solicited and negotiated estimated quantity contract to the firm GE Grid Solutions LLC to supply Positive Train Control (PTC) Data Radios

payload.description: Competitively solicited and negotiated estimated quantity contract to GE Grid Solutions LLC

tool_args.label: East River Tunnel rehabilitation - implemented by Amtrak
tool_args.raw_text: Amtrak rehabilitation work in the East River tunnels to repair damage caused by Superstorm Sandy

payload.description: Amtrak rehabilitation work in the East River tunnels

tool_args.label: Grand Central Madison mitigated Amtrak tunnel impact
tool_args.raw_text: this intense but collaborative dialogue, combined with the opening of Grand Central Madison, has resulted in minimal impact to LIRR's overall service. Timetable impacts were limited to two Penn-to-GCM train diversions and a 27-minute time adjustment to another train

payload.claim_text: The opening of Grand Central Madison has resulted in minimal impact to LIRR's overall service from the East River tunnel work. Timetable impacts were limited to two Penn-to-GCM train diversions and a 27-minute time adjustment to another train.
payload.subject: LIRR service
payload.description: Grand Central Madison mitigated timetable impacts from Amtrak East River Tunnel rehabilitation

tool_args.label: Metro-North highest OTP on record
tool_args.raw_text: This is the highest OTP on record for September and the highest YTP OTP on record

payload.claim_text: This is the highest OTP on record for September and the highest YTD OTP on record for Metro-North Railroad.
payload.subject: Metro-North Railroad
payload.description: Systemwide OTP for September was highest on record

tool_args.label: Metro-North ridership exceeded 80% of pre-COVID
tool_args.raw_text: the first month this metric has exceeded 80%

payload.claim_text: This represents 80.9% of pre-COVID ridership in September 2019, the first month this metric has exceeded 80%.
payload.subject: Metro-North Railroad
payload.description: First month ridership exceeded 80% of pre-COVID levels

tool_args.label: Garrison Track Raise Team acknowledged
tool_args.raw_text: President Rinaldi thanked the C&D team and the MofW team for their work at the Garrison Station, and stated that she is grateful for the Capital Program that will address the needs of stations across their system

payload.claim_text: The C&D team and the MofW team did work at the Garrison Station and the Capital Program will address the needs of stations across the system.
payload.subject: MTA Construction and Development
payload.description: Garrison Track Raise Team work acknowledged at Board meeting

tool_args.label: Waterbury service restoration
tool_args.raw_text: the Waterbury service began this morning after weeks of restoration work following the wash-out during Connecticut's historic floods in August. Work completed two weeks early

payload.claim_text: The Waterbury service began this morning after weeks of restoration work following the wash-out during Connecticut's historic floods in August. Work was completed two weeks early by CDOT, contractors, and MofW.
payload.subject: Metro-North Railroad
payload.description: Waterbury service restored two weeks early after August 2024 flood damage in Connecticut

tool_args.label: LIRR November timetable mentioned at meeting
tool_args.raw_text: President Free reported on the schedules to accommodate the upcoming Amtrak rehabilitation work in the East River tunnels

payload.description: The meeting discussed the November 11 timetable designed to accommodate East River Tunnel work

tool_args.label: Waterbury service restoration - CDOT and contractors
tool_args.raw_text: Executive Vice President Vonashek acknowledged the work of CDOT, contractors, and MofW, which completed the work two weeks early

payload.description: Waterbury service restoration work completed two weeks early by CDOT, contractors, and MofW
